layers.nm: Got my iPhone 17 month ago, and I really miss my 13 Pro. It had 87% battery health after 2 years and the battery was holding the same as this brand new 17 with 100% health. Camera was somehow better, less procesing and stuff, im really dissapointed in camera on 17, it takes forever to shot, battery life mid and the top that, iOS 26 is a mess. iOS 18.7.2 on 13 pro flies. I regret not holding onto 13 pro for one more year and upgrading to iPhone 18. But iPhone 17, really is the best base iPhone, just a little dissapointed by all those stuff.
